sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract in ('','UNKNOWN')
delete TransX from TransX t left join CatContracts c on t.Contract + CAST(t.UWYr as nvarchar) = c.Contract + CAST(c.UWYear as nvarchar) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and c.Contract is null
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join PCTRS c on t.PC = c.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy, Region = p.Region, Location = p.Location from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex3 = Mapkey from TransX t inner join mapkeyranges m on t.GL >= m.fromGL and t.GL <=m.thruGL where keyID = '[batchID]' and mapkey like 'M1-_-%-%-%' and not mapkey like 'M1-_-%-%-%-%'
update TransX set Flex4 = m.Name from TransX t inner join mapkeys m on t.flex3 = m.mapkey where keyID = '[batchID]'
